name: Runpod
description: Registers Runpod Serverless OpenAI-compatible endpoints as first-party chat providers with endpoint-scoped model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Runpod API key used for endpoint-scoped model discovery and OpenAI-compatible inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Fallback Runpod Serverless endpoint ID used when no endpoint_id Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional comma-separated model IDs exposed by the configured Runpod endpoint when discovery is unavailable or returns no models.

settings.label: Runpod API key
settings.description: Runpod API key used for endpoint-scoped model discovery and OpenAI-compatible inference. Falls back to RUNPOD_API_KEY.

settings.label: Runpod endpoint ID
settings.description: Runpod Serverless endpoint ID for an endpoint that exposes OpenAI-compatible /openai/v1 routes. Falls back to RUNPOD_ENDPOINT_ID.

settings.label: Runpod model IDs
settings.description: Optional model IDs to expose when discovery is unavailable or returns no models. Falls back to comma-separated RUNPOD_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: Runpod
providers.description: Refreshes models from a configured Runpod Serverless OpenAI-compatible /models endpoint and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
